_doc.t510_canonical_core: T510: This is Codex's REAL native hook config (replaces the prior Claude-format clone). Codex reads `.codex/hooks.json` (or inline `[hooks]` in config.toml). Each native event below routes to a thin canonical entrypoint `python .codex/hooks/g-hk-on-<event>.py`, which calls `g_hk_core.dispatch("<event>")`. The shared core `.codex/hooks/g_hk_core.py` is byte-identical across every platform overlay and runs the per-event CONCERN_CHAIN (the concern hooks self-gate on payload, so routing a coarse event through the full chain is safe). Native->canonical map (g_hk_core.PLATFORM_EVENT_MAP['codex']): SessionStart->session-start, UserPromptSubmit->user-prompt-submit, PreToolUse->tool-start, PostToolUse->tool-end, Stop->stop. Codex has no SessionEnd event, so session-end is not wired here (graceful degradation). Schema verified against https://developers.openai.com/codex/hooks (Claude-style matcher+hooks; type=command; only command handlers run today).
